summary: Completed comprehensive testing of GitStack SaaS platform features. All 7 requested features are fully functional including Browse by Topic filtering, LIVE GitHub trending data, real founder stacks, AI tools, and collections.
passed_tests: Browse by Topic - AI Agents shows 4 AI tools (LangChain, Flowise, Dify, LlamaIndex)
Browse by Topic - UI/UX shows different tools (Formbricks, Ghost, shadcn/ui)
Trending Now shows LIVE GitHub data with star counts and weekly growth
What Founders Actually Used shows Cal.com, Supabase, n8n stacks with tech chips
Dead Tool Detector successfully processes paid tools and returns free alternatives
Stack Generator generates recommended tool stacks for project ideas
All trending tabs (Top this week, Today, This month, New & rising) functional
AI integrations working with proper response times
Navigation between all pages working correctly
